findings.message: New data-store write path with no metric or span instrumentation. The delete_items_by_prefix function performs a database write operation (delete) without any observability instrumentation, making this operation invisible to observability systems.
findings.suggestion: Add metric and/or span instrumentation around the delete operation. Consider wrapping the session operations with OpenTelemetry spans and recording metrics (e.g., row count, latency) similar to how create_item or list_items should be instrumented for observability.
